message:
test(ftui-extras): add 36 tests for plasma.rs coverage (65→101)

New tests cover: lerp edge cases (same values, max values, quarter points),
HSV intermediate values (partial saturation/value, sextant edges), wave
function properties (full vs low differ, time=0 boundary, continuity,
time variance), theme gradient segment boundaries, palette midpoint
transitions (cyberpunk/sunset/ocean), fire intermediate segments, galaxy
4th segment, render edge cases (1xN/Nx1/100x60/time=0), palette
switching, scratch multi-resize determinism, fixed/theme palette
distinctness, monochrome linearity, subtle theme adaptation, neon
intermediate hues, reduced/minimal quality per-palette, aurora fallback,
palette Eq/Hash/Copy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
